name: Couscous Des Legumes
recipeIngredient: 1 small sweet potato, peeled and cut into 1 or 2-inch chunks
1 small carrot, peeled and cut into ½-inch slices
1 medium or 2 small new potatoes, cut into chunks
1 small to medium turnip, peeled and cut into 1-inch chunks
1/2 head green cabbage, cut into chunks
1 handful of green beans (trimmed and cut into 2-inch lengths) or
2 zucchini, trimmed and cut into ¾-inch slices or chunks
1 green pepper, stemmed, seeded and cut into strips
1 tablespoon to 2 tablespoons orange flower or rose water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until softened.
2. Stir in spices and cook for a few moments to release flavors.
3. Add tomatoes, broth, sweet potato, carrot, and potatoes. Simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Add remaining vegetables and simmer another 15 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
5. Add chick-peas and remove from heat.
6. In a large bowl or saucepan, combine couscous and raisins.
7. Remove 2 cups of the vegetable broth and bring to a boil. Pour over couscous and raisins, cover, and let stand for 10 minutes.
8. Stir in butter and fluff with a fork.
9. To serve: Mound couscous on a platter, sprinkle with orange flower or rose water, and ladle vegetables and broth over the top. Serve immediately.
